sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: 다나허는 2026년 1분기 매출 60억 달러와 조정 EPS 2.06달러를 기록하며 견조한 실적을 달성했습니다.

keyPoints.text: 1분기 매출은 전년 동기 대비 3.5% 증가한 60억 달러를 기록했으며, 조정 EPS는 9.5% 성장한 2.06달러를 달성했습니다.
바이오프로세싱 부문의 강세와 생명과학 부문의 예상을 상회하는 성과가 세피드(Cepheid)의 호흡기 시즌 수요 감소 영향을 상쇄했습니다.

businessChanges.text: 마시모(Masimo) 인수를 발표하며 급성기 치료 환경에서의 환자 모니터링 솔루션 사업 확장을 추진하고 있습니다.

financialHighlights.text: 1분기 영업 현금흐름은 13억 달러, 비GAAP 기준 잉여 현금흐름은 11억 달러를 기록했습니다.
2026년 연간 조정 EPS 가이던스를 기존 8.35~8.50달러에서 8.35~8.55달러로 상향 조정했습니다.

watchItems.text: 마시모 인수 이후 다나허의 DBS(Danaher Business System)를 통한 수익성 개선 및 통합 시너지 효과를 확인할 필요가 있습니다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 dhr-20260421xex991.htm EX-99.1 Document Exhibit 99.1 Innovation at the speed of life Danaher Reports First Quarter 2026 Results WASHINGTON D.C., April 21, 2026 -- Danaher Corporation (NYSE: DHR) today announced results for the first quarter 2026. All results in this release reflect only continuing operations and period-to-period comparisons are year-over-year unless otherwise noted. Key First Quarter 2026 Results • Net earnings were $1.0 billion, or $1.45 per diluted common share. • Non-GAAP adjusted diluted net earnings per common share grew 9.5% to $2.06. • Revenues increased 3.5% year-over-year to $6.0 billion and non-GAAP core revenue increased 0.5% year-over-year. • Operating cash flow was $1.3 billion and non-GAAP free cash flow was $1.1 billion. • Strong Q1 earnin  Normalized numeric aliases: $1.0 billion = 10억 달러; $6.0 billion = 60억 달러; $1.3 billion = 13억 달러; $1.1 billion = 11억 달러; $1.0 = 1.0달러; $1.45 = 1.45달러; $2.06 = 2.06달러; $6.0 = 6.0달러; $1.1 = 1.1달러; $1.3 = 1.3달러.

ner M. Blair, President and Chief Executive Officer, stated, “Our team executed well in the first quarter, which enabled us to accelerate innovation, drive productivity gains, and deliver nearly 10% adjusted EPS growth. On the top line, we continued on a steady recovery path with strength in Bioprocessing and better-than-expected performance in Life Sciences largely offsetting the impact of a lighter-than-typical Q1 respiratory season at Cepheid.” Mr. Blair continued, “We were also pleased to announce our intention to acquire Masimo Corporation, a leading provider of mission-critical pulse oximetry and patient monitoring solutions in acute care settings. We believe there are clear opportunities to enhance Masimo’s performance through DBS and our global scale. Looking ahead, the strength of our balance sheet and free cash flow generation provides additional capacity for value-creating cap

, discrete tax adjustments, impairments, gains and losses on investments and the outcome of legal proceedings) are difficult to predict and estimate and are often dependent on future events that may be uncertain or outside of our control. The impact of these additional elements could be material to our results computed in accordance with GAAP. For the second quarter 2026, the Company anticipates that non-GAAP core revenue will increase in the low-single digit percent range year-over-year. For full year 2026, the Company continues to expect that non-GAAP core revenue will increase in the 3% to 6% range year-over-year. The Company is also increasing its full year adjusted diluted net earnings per common share guidance to a range of $8.35 to $8.55 versus previous guidance of $8.35 to $8.50. Conference Call and Webcast Information Danaher will discuss its first quarter results and financial  Normalized numeric aliases: $8.35 = 8.35달러; $8.55 = 8.55달러; $8.50 = 8.50달러.

generation.costPolicy: Provider chain: Spark OAuth/free first, Gemini free second, approved DeepSeek v4 flash paid last on quota only.
